candidates.why: Most direct top-line sales/revenue line; equals Total Revenue in preview and is more specific than the total.
Explicit total revenue line; valid fallback if primary sales label is missing in some years.
Expense line, not revenue.
Expense total, not revenue.
Non-operating income, not revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Interest income on trade receivables and payables
candidates.why: Interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels across years; both are exact top-line labels, with the more specific sales line first.

candidates.why: Direct cost line immediately below revenue; best match for COGS.
Transaction/non-recurring acquisition-related cost, not core COGS.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement COGS.
Balancing row; should be avoided when a direct line exists.
Total duplicate of Cost of sales; less preferred than the direct line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS row and excluded the duplicate total and balancing item.

candidates.why: Best available overhead bucket above EBIT; explicit operating overhead line and preferred over broader subtotals like Operating (Income)/Expense - Net.
Headcount metric from balance sheet, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A or separate overhead components are shown. 'Operating expenses' is the best operating overhead bucket above EBIT. Excluded depreciation/amortisation and broader subtotal 'Operating (Income)/Expense - Net' per rules.
No dedicated research/development row is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Net finance line includes finance income, so less preferred than recurring cost components.
Total finance cost line that includes interest expense and other financing cost; less granular than underlying recurring components.
Primary recurring interest expense line; strongest match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component that should be included in XINT alongside other recurring interest components.
Profit allocation item, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid duplicate counting when primary row exists.
Equity line, not interest expense.
Equity line, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance cost components over net/total finance lines. Excluded 'Other financing cost' because it was not in the candidate list and the chosen labels already capture the core recurring interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Company
candidates.why: Owner-attributable equity excluding non-controlling interests; best match for BE under the no-double-counting rule.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner-attributable equity exists.
Shareholder count, not equity.
Balancing row, not reported equity line.
Total balance sheet total, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Company

variables.notes: Selected owner-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet minority equity; less preferred.
Exact balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interests; best match.
Equivalent balance sheet label and good fallback across years.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list; both appear to be equivalent labels for the same concept across reporting styles/years.
